name: contracts-crm-api
description: API do Contracts CRM para gerenciamento de clientes, contratos, templates e assinaturas.

scripts.check: npm run check:syntax && npm run prisma:validate
scripts.check:syntax: node --check server.js && node --check prisma/client.js && node --check middleware/auth.Middleware.js && node --check middleware/errorHandler.Middleware.js && node --check middleware/role.Middleware.js && node --check routes/auth.Routes.js && node --check routes/client.Routes.js && node --check routes/contract.Routes.js && node --check routes/template.Routes.js && node --check controllers/auth.Controller.js && node --check controllers/client.Controller.js && node --check controllers/contract.Controller.js && node --check controllers/template.Controller.js && node --check utils/sensitiveDataCrypto.Util.js && node --check utils/userProfilePresenter.Util.js
